style.artDirection: Minimal forged glyphs with a machined silhouette, a restrained fill accent, and no stock icon-pack dependency.

icons.label: Move image
icons.notes: Four-way move handle with a centered pivot so canvas arrangement reads immediately as repositioning.

icons.label: Import image
icons.notes: Upload arrow above a compact image frame so the rail reads as image import instead of generic add-tab creation.

icons.label: Select subject
icons.notes: Subject bust framed by corner guides so the action reads as subject selection.

icons.label: Select region
icons.notes: Marquee selection frame with an inset capture tile so region selection stays distinct from subject extraction.

icons.label: Background swap
icons.notes: Landscape tile with a horizontal exchange arrow to make the background replacement action explicit.

icons.label: Cleanup
icons.notes: Angled eraser with cleanup spark to make targeted removal legible at a glance.

icons.label: Variations
icons.notes: Primary tile branching into two sibling tiles so variant generation reads as branching, not stacking.

icons.label: Protect
icons.notes: Protected region tile paired with a compact shield so no-edit protection reads immediately.

icons.label: Make Space
icons.notes: Centered room box with arrows pushing outward so reserve-or-create-space intent reads directly.

icons.label: Remove People
icons.notes: Human silhouette with a clean strike so people removal stays distinct from general cleanup.

icons.label: Polish
icons.notes: Primary sparkle with smaller accents so finish/polish reads as a clean global refinement.

icons.label: Relight
icons.notes: Half-lit disc with restrained rays so relighting reads as a lighting pass, not exposure only.

icons.label: Create Tool
icons.notes: Centered core with three tabs and a small forge spark.

icons.label: Export
icons.notes: Downstream release arrow framed by a lifted shoulder and base rule.
